tasks.title: Bootstrap Xcode project + UmbraCore package skeleton
acceptance_criteria: Umbra.xcodeproj opens and builds an empty app target linking the empty UmbraCore package
swift test runs cleanly against UmbraCore with zero tests
Uses Xcode file-system-synchronized groups so later lanes add files without editing project.pbxproj
No App Sandbox extras beyond default entitlement; no network/ATS exceptions present

tasks.title: Geometry primitives
acceptance_criteria: Point2D, Size2D, Polygon are Codable/Equatable/Hashable value types, Foundation-only
Polygon is an ordered point ring with no raster/image representation anywhere

tasks.title: Level model and mutation surface
acceptance_criteria: Level is the single canonical schema with a schemaVersion field
LevelMutation is a closed enum covering move/rotate/duplicate/delete/reset and is the only state-change surface
Level and its members are value types; no in-place mutable array exposed

tasks.title: Content seed: starter level + 5 internal fixtures
acceptance_criteria: Starter level is solvable and free of unintended shortcut solutions
Each fixture encodes exactly the named edge case (touching-only, near-collinear rotation, zero-area, light-inside-occluder, duplicate-overlap) as literal Level/Occluder data, not test logic
Fixtures are internal-only, never surfaced in shipped app UI

tasks.title: SolveEngine: 2a proof point then full scanline quadrature
acceptance_criteria: First lands as a minimal touching-only-overlap proof at tightest resolution with instrumentation against a known-good baseline before expanding
Final version implements 2048-strip fixed-resolution deterministic scanline quadrature, no general polygon boolean ops, no third-party geometry code
solve(_:) is pure and synchronous, no async/Task anywhere in this file
MatchState thresholds are close >= 0.970, solved >= 0.985 with a fixed deadband

tasks.title: LevelValidator save-time gate
acceptance_criteria: validate(_:) reuses SolveEngine and rejects zero-area shadow, light-inside-occluder, and unreachable-target levels
Same validator function is the one used later by both editor save and import's geometrically-invalid check — no parallel rule set

tasks.title: Share artifact schema
acceptance_criteria: LevelArtifactEnvelope carries schemaVersion alongside the Level payload
ImportFailure has exactly the three locked cases: truncatedOrMalformed, unsupportedSchemaVersion, geometricallyInvalid

tasks.title: Persistence schema and store protocol
acceptance_criteria: LevelStore is synchronous and throwing, no async networking layer
importAsNewEntry always inserts, never overwrites on id collision
VaultEntry.solved is documented as always recomputed/invalidated, never independently settable

tasks.title: UmbraCore test suite: fixtures, fuzz, round-trip, determinism replay
acceptance_criteria: Fuzz suite uses an explicitly seeded, replayable PRNG with an occluder-count dial pushed well past realistic level sizes
Round-trip encode/decode/diff shows zero drift on fixed fixtures plus fuzzed permutations
50-run determinism replay runs a recorded LevelMutation script through a fresh LevelSessionModel-equivalent path 50 times with canonical-snapshot diffing
Comparisons use epsilon (~1e-8) for live/replay geometry and exact structural equality for serialized snapshots, never naive Double Equatable
All green via swift test with no simulator boot; this is the hard gate — interfaces are frozen once this passes

tasks.title: FileLevelStore implementation
acceptance_criteria: Atomic writes via temp file + FileManager.replaceItemAt
Separate draft file so a mid-edit crash cannot corrupt the vault manifest
Application Support directory only, no iCloud container

tasks.title: ShareArtifactCoder implementation
acceptance_criteria: encode/decode round-trips LevelArtifactEnvelope to/from a base64url JSON string with zero drift
decode maps every failure mode to one of the three ImportFailure cases, never a generic error
No networking, no URLSession, anywhere in this file

tasks.title: Local entitlement store stub
acceptance_criteria: isProEditorUnlocked is always true for this build
No StoreKit import, no purchase UI wired anywhere

tasks.title: App composition root
acceptance_criteria: AppModel wires VaultStore and EntitlementStore against the FileLevelStore/LocalAlwaysUnlockedEntitlementStore concrete instances in one place
Vault is always the implicit navigation root, no splash screen
This file is the sole place lane wiring happens — other lanes must not add their own composition roots

tasks.title: Vault screen
acceptance_criteria: Pre-seeded success, skeleton-loading, and corrupted-save states are all implemented and reachable
Card thumbnail renders from vector targetPreview geometry, never a raster asset
Calls into CorruptedSaveErrorView (owned by polish_resilience) for the corrupted-save state rather than inlining its own error UI

tasks.title: LevelSessionModel reducer
acceptance_criteria: apply(_:) is synchronous, computes a new Level value then assigns, never mutates array elements in place
level is private(set); apply(_:) is the only mutation entry point usable by gesture, discrete-control, and test callers alike
commitSave() runs LevelValidator before persisting and surfaces the specific LevelValidationError

tasks.title: PuzzleCanvasView play mode
acceptance_criteria: Drag/rotate gestures commit only on gesture end; an interrupted gesture rolls back to the last committed transform, never persists a partial frame
Discrete VoiceOver nudge/rotation-stepper control cluster is visible and always-on for every user, not VoiceOver-only, and drives the same LevelMutation cases as drag
Control cluster is floating with anchor-flip at standard Dynamic Type and canvas size, docked at AX1+ or below the compact-canvas threshold

Every draggable object has a plain-language accessibility label including approximate position/rotation; overlap readout uses the monospaced-digit variant and posts an accessibility notification on crossing close-match/solved thresholds
Reports element frames via PreferenceKey so onboarding coach-marks (owned by polish_resilience) can anchor to them

tasks.title: Solve confirmation and edit mode
acceptance_criteria: Solve confirmation is an in-place state transition on the existing canvas, never a new screen, and never auto-dismisses
Edit mode reuses PuzzleCanvasView with CanvasMode.edit and is a strict superset of Play's controls, never a separate control set
EditSaveShareSheet disables save with an inline reason string sourced from LevelValidationError, never a silently greyed-out button
Calls SolveConfirmationHaptics.fireSolved() and SolveConfirmationTransition.animation(reduceMotionEnabled:) from polish_resilience rather than inlining haptic/animation logic
Share is triggered only via system ShareLink/Share Sheet, no custom share UI

tasks.title: Import screen
acceptance_criteria: Empty state never auto-reads the clipboard; paste-from-clipboard is an explicit tap
Preview-before-commit state requires explicit confirm before importAsNewEntry runs
Truncated/malformed, unsupported-schema-version, and geometrically-invalid each render as visually distinct states with a one-line explanation plus technical detail behind a disclosure

tasks.title: Solve haptics and reduced-motion transition
acceptance_criteria: fireSolved/fireCloseMatchTick wrap UINotificationFeedbackGenerator/UIImpactFeedbackGenerator only
animation(reduceMotionEnabled:) returns a cross-fade under Reduce Motion and a highlight-sweep otherwise; the cue itself is never dropped

tasks.title: Corrupted-save and damaged-level fallback UI
acceptance_criteria: Honest copy plus a concrete reset-to-starter or reset-to-last-known-good recovery action, never a silent blank state
Reusable by both Vault's corrupted-manifest case and Play's resumed-level-fails-validation fallback

tasks.title: Onboarding coach marks
acceptance_criteria: Anchored to real live canvas element frames via PreferenceKey, never a screenshot
Dismissed by performing the taught gesture, not a Next button; seen-flag persisted in UserDefaults only
Two to three steps max, layered on the first real Play session, never a separate tutorial mode with different rules

tasks.title: Accessibility and Dynamic Type verification
acceptance_criteria: Verifies (does not author) the VoiceOver labels and floating-to-docked control cluster transition built into T-204/T-205
Tests every Dynamic Type step, not just the extremes, specifically around the floating/docked transition boundary
Fails the build if any interactive element lacks a label or the docked layout overlaps puzzle geometry at AX5

tasks.title: Live shadow recompute performance verification
acceptance_criteria: Instruments Time Profiler pass on the oldest iOS-17-supported device confirms 60fps at realistic occluder counts and reports the pathological-count result from T-008's fuzz dial
If the bar isn't met, this task files a new named follow-up task for the 30Hz-during-drag throttle rather than silently shipping unverified performance

tasks.title: Device recovery and cross-device share verification
acceptance_criteria: Forced-quit mid-play and mid-edit both resume to exact in-progress geometry on relaunch, verified on a real device not a simulator
A share code generated on one real device is cold-imported on a second real device with no more context than 'try this' and opens correctly
Smoke XCUITest covers launch to open starter level to solve to confirmation sheet
